title: Playing Cards
description: Playing card assets for the Blackjack plugin by DefectiveVortex.
body:
# Playing Cards Resource Pack

A high-quality Minecraft resource pack that adds realistic playing card models for casino and card game plugins.

## Features

- 52 unique card models (complete standard deck)
- Card back design
- Optimized textures (16x16)
- Clean, readable card designs
- Smooth 3D models
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.3+

## Usage

This resource pack is designed primarily for plugin developers who want to implement card games in Minecraft. It uses the custom model data feature with the Clock item as its base.

### Model Paths

Cards follow a simple naming convention:
- Regular cards: `card/[suit][rank]`
  - Suits: s (spades), h (hearts), d (diamonds), c (clubs)
  - Ranks: 1 (ace), 2-10, j, q, k
- Card back: `card/back`

Example: 
- Ace of Spades: `card/s1`
- King of Hearts: `card/hk`
- Ten of Diamonds: `card/d10`

## Installation

### For Players
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in your game settings
4. If playing on a server, accept the server's resource pack prompt

### For Server Owners
1. Place the resource pack file in your server directory
2. Add the following to your `server.properties`:

#### To merge with an existing resource pack:
1. Download [Resourceloader](https://modrinth.com/plugin/resourceloader). (You'd be supporting me!)
2. Merge your existing pack with the playing cards pack using the `/merge` feature
